MarsDAO
Partnership
Users can stake MDAO tokens and receive rewards in partner project tokens.
Staking
Users who have tiered NFTs can stake tokens and receive rewards in MDAO.
Swap to DAO
In this section, you can swap your MARS tokens to MDAO tokens.
MDAO LIFESTYLE
Custom program for MarsDAO ecosystem users. Receive generous discounts for holding MDAO tokens
AUTO.FARM
A contract platform where users can significantly increase their farming income by using re-staking automation mechanisms.
MDAO Maker
An online platform for IWOs (Initial Wallet Offering), which gives users the opportunity to purchase a project allocation during seed rounds.
MDAO Wallet
Cryptocurrency Telegram Wallet with extensive features.
Grants
MarsDAO grant system. A great opportunity for existing projects and development teams to put promising ideas into practice.
Become a partner
To become a MarsDAO partner, submit an application to bd@daomars.com.
Audits
Gitbook
Keep track of MarsDAO and its products, and learn about our plans and ideas.
Medium
Contains interesting articles and handy user guides that will help you navigate the MarsDAO ecosystem.
Github
Allows tracking all MarsDAO development stages and progress.
Twitter
Latest news about the MarsDAO ecosystem and partners. Follow us!
